name: Peach-Mint Granita
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Ripe Peaches, peeled, pitted and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer and discard the pulp.
4. If sugar is not fully dissolved, continue stirring until it is completely dissolved.
5. Pour the mixture into an ice cube tray and freeze until solid.
6. To serve, place the frozen cubes in a single layer in a food processor and pulse several times to break them into uniform pieces.
7. Repeat with any remaining cubes.
8. Serve immediately in glasses with frozen stems.
Yield: 4 servings
